subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方 腹の据え方 いい年のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, how to act cocky, how to stay resolute, how to act our age...

subtitles.original: 脂の乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらしない身体
subtitles.english: ...with our fully ripened, cloudy-eyed, sloppy bodies.

subtitles.original: 幸せの体感速度は
subtitles.english: The speed at which we feel happiness...

subtitles.original: 早くなるばかり
subtitles.english: ...only gets faster and faster.

subtitles.original: 傷が癒えていく速度は
subtitles.english: The speed at which wounds heal...

subtitles.original: 遅くなるばかり
subtitles.english: ...only gets slower and slower.

subtitles.original: 他人に期待をしないのが
subtitles.english: Not expecting anything from others...

subtitles.original: 今の俺の強み
subtitles.english: ...is my strength now.

subtitles.original: 手負いでも進める距離なら
subtitles.english: If it's a distance we can cover even if we struggle,

subtitles.original: 行く 騙し騙し
subtitles.english: we'll keep going, making do as we go.

subtitles.original: 身の程を知るほどに
subtitles.english: The more I learn my place,

subtitles.original: 胸を張り いつも通り
subtitles.english: the more I hold my head high, just like always.

subtitles.original: デジタルな世に いい背伸び
subtitles.english: But sometimes, stretching ourselves is fine.

subtitles.original: やっと「大人気ない」ができる年
subtitles.english: We're finally at an age where we can act "childish."

subtitles.original: 小さな枠組み ただの数字
subtitles.english: A small framework is just a number.

subtitles.original: 縛られずに
subtitles.english: Don't be bound by it...

subtitles.original: でも腹を括り
subtitles.english: ...but brace yourself.

subtitles.original: あの日の俺が立ち止まる
subtitles.english: The version of me from back then stops in his tracks...

subtitles.original: ほどにデカく聳え立つ
subtitles.english: ...before the towering monument.

subtitles.original: 隅田川にかかる
subtitles.english: Crossing over the Sumida River,

subtitles.original: 勝鬨橋を渡る
subtitles.english: I cross the Kachidoki Bridge.

subtitles.original: 重なるスカイツリー
subtitles.english: Overlapping with the Tokyo Skytree...

subtitles.original: 東京タワーと真ん中の頼りない背中
subtitles.english: ...and Tokyo Tower, a fragile back in the middle.

subtitles.original: サボり方とか 甘え方とか
subtitles.english: How to slack off, how to baby ourselves,

subtitles.original: 逃げ方とか 言い訳の仕方とか
subtitles.english: how to run away, how to make excuses...

subtitles.original: やっと覚えてきた 身につけてきた
subtitles.english: We've finally learned and acquired...

subtitles.original: 柔らかい頭
subtitles.english: ...flexible minds.

subtitles.original: カッコのつけ方 調子のこき方
subtitles.english: How to look cool, how to act cocky,

subtitles.original: 腹の据え方 いい年のこき方
subtitles.english: how to stay resolute, how to act our age...

subtitles.original: 脂の乗りに乗った 濁った目した だらしない身体
subtitles.english: ...with our fully ripened, cloudy-eyed, sloppy bodies.

subtitles.original: 嫌われ方や 慕われ方や
subtitles.english: How to be disliked, how to be adored,

subtitles.original: 叱り方とか 綺麗なぶつかり方
subtitles.english: how to scold, how to clash gracefully...

subtitles.original: 覚えたいことが山のようにある
subtitles.english: There's a mountain of things we still want to learn.

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We've got nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We've got nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We've got nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: のびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We've got nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: 俺たちまだのびしろしかないわ
subtitles.english: We still have nothing but room to grow!

subtitles.original: ばかまじめ
subtitles.english: [Bakamajime (Damn Serious)]

subtitles.original: くだんない話と
subtitles.english: All this nonsense...

subtitles.original: うざったい貴様と
subtitles.english: ...and annoying you...

subtitles.original: なみなみの日々に注がれてく
subtitles.english: ...are poured into these overflowing days.

subtitles.original: 怠いが溢れ出していく
subtitles.english: Laziness starts to overflow,

subtitles.original: 飯がまだ届かない
subtitles.english: and my food hasn't arrived yet.

subtitles.original: 仕事は片付かない
subtitles.english: My work isn't done.

subtitles.original: うだつの上がらない 毎日にため息ばかり
subtitles.english: I'm sighing day by day that I'm not getting anywhere.

subtitles.original: でまたド派手にすっころび
subtitles.english: And then I fell down again with a bang,

subtitles.original: 洗い立てのシャツにこぼすコーヒー
subtitles.english: coffee spilled on my freshly washed shirt.

subtitles.original: 前のめりその姿勢だけは褒めて良し
subtitles.english: You can praise my posture, always leaning forward,

subtitles.original: 肩落とす並木通り 増えた柄と差し色に
subtitles.english: with my shoulders slumped in the tree-lined road with new patterns and accent colors.

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当嫌になる毎日だ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm really fed up with days like this.

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to...

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: ...or wake up early in the morning against my will...

subtitles.original: その分素敵な何かが 訪れるとかそんなわけでもないのにさ
subtitles.english: ...doesn't mean something wonderful will come to visit.

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうよな
subtitles.english: But I keep working hard again today.

subtitles.original: がむしゃら以外知らないから
subtitles.english: I don't know anything but to go recklessly.

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで 馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May we who are clumsy, stubborn, and damn serious be blessed!

subtitles.original: 重くなってきた荷物をちょっと置いて立ち止まり
subtitles.english: I put down my heavy luggage and stopped for a moment.

subtitles.original: 昨日の事なんざ忘れちまえば同じ
subtitles.english: It's all the same if you forget about yesterday.

subtitles.original: 浴びるday light 羽根伸ばし
subtitles.english: Relax and unwind in the light of day.

subtitles.original: それか月夜にこっそりと吐き出してしまえば良い
subtitles.english: Better let it out quietly in the moonlit night.

subtitles.original: でもその前にアレとコレの話
subtitles.english: But before that, we'll have this and that to talk about.

subtitles.original: その為には先ずはソレを片し
subtitles.english: First of all, we've got to do it up before we go.

subtitles.original: って今は何時？いやその前に
subtitles.english: What time is it? Nope, before that...

subtitles.original: 今日もなんだかんだ騒がしい毎度あり
subtitles.english: ...it's another noisy day, hey, there you go again.

subtitles.original: 1ヶ月くらい何にも
subtitles.english: For about a month...

subtitles.original: 考えずだらだらしていたいな
subtitles.english: ...I want to be lazy without thinking of anything.

subtitles.original: ゆっくり休んで遊んで眠っていたいな
subtitles.english: I want to rest, have fun, and sleep...

subtitles.original: って思う日もあるけれど
subtitles.english: ...there are days when I wish I could.

subtitles.original: やっとここまで来たんだよ
subtitles.english: We've finally made it this far.

subtitles.original: ここじゃ終われないんだよ
subtitles.english: We just can't stop here.

subtitles.original: 辛い きつい もいつかは
subtitles.english: All the hard and painful times...

subtitles.original: 笑い話にできると信じてるんだ ほら
subtitles.english: ...will be a laughing matter someday, I believe so.

subtitles.original: 今日もまた頑張っちゃうからさ
subtitles.english: So I keep working hard again today.

subtitles.original: がむしゃらに愛を歌うからさ
subtitles.english: I'm gonna sing for love with all my heart.

subtitles.original: 目一杯吸い込んだ空気
subtitles.english: Breathing in all the air...

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当素晴らしい毎日だ
subtitles.english: Ah, it's really a wonderful day!

subtitles.original: やりたくないことやったって
subtitles.english: Even if I do things I don't want to...

subtitles.original: 嫌々早起きしたって
subtitles.english: ...or wake up early in the morning against my will...

subtitles.original: ほんの少しの幸せに
subtitles.english: Touching a little bit of happiness...

subtitles.original: 触れるだけで全部全部ありに思えるんだ
subtitles.english: ...makes me feel like everything's worth it.

subtitles.original: 明日もまた頑張ってみようか
subtitles.english: Give it a try again tomorrow.

subtitles.original: がむしゃらに生きていくんだ
subtitles.english: I'm going to live recklessly.

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで 馬鹿真面目な僕らに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May we who are clumsy, stubborn, and damn serious be blessed!

subtitles.original: do my thing do your thing
subtitles.english: Do my thing, do your thing.

subtitles.original: 肩の力を抜いて柔軟に
subtitles.english: Relax your shoulders and be flexible.

subtitles.original: do my thing do your thing
subtitles.english: Do my thing, do your thing.

subtitles.original: あと1ミリ背伸び
subtitles.english: Stretch your back a little higher.

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 本当嫌になっちゃうよな
subtitles.english: Ah, I really hate it.

subtitles.original: それでも今を生きている
subtitles.english: But I'm still alive now.

subtitles.original: 不器用で意地っ張りで 馬鹿真面目なあなたに幸あれ
subtitles.english: May you who are clumsy, stubborn, and damn serious be blessed!

responses.thoughts:
Okay, here's the breakdown of my thought process, as requested:

**Comprehensive Analysis: Subtitling a Multi-Song Video**

Right, so the task is to generate subtitles for a video starting at 00:00. Naturally, the first step is to analyze the video's contents, both visually and aurally. The initial audio from 00:00 to 01:53 features the song "Nobishiro" by Creepy Nuts, which is confirmed by the title on the top-left of the screen.

I'm thinking, "Let's grab the lyrics for 'Nobishiro'." I went through the audio minute by minute to ensure I matched the timecodes to each lyric line in Japanese, then found its precise English translation.

I meticulously went through each line, starting at 00:00.000, and double-checked the Japanese lyrics with their accurate timing and translation, verifying:
*   "Kakko no tsukekata, choushi no kokikata, hara no suekata, ii toshi no kokikata" – "How to look cool, how to act cocky, how to stay resolute, how to act our age."
*   "Abura no nori ni notta, nigotta me shita, darashinai karada" – "Full of fat, with cloudy eyes, a sloppy body."
*   "Shiawase no taikan sokudo wa hayaku (hayaku) naru bakari" - "The speed at which we feel happiness only gets faster (and faster)."
*   "Kizu ga iete iku sokudo wa osoku naru bakari" - "The speed at which wounds heal only gets slower and slower."
*   "Hito ni kitai wo shinai no ga ima no ore no tsuyomi" - "Not expecting anything from others is my strength now."
*   "Teoi demo susumeru kyori nara iku damashi damashi" - "If it's a distance we can cover even if we struggle, we'll keep going, making do as we go."
*   "Mino hodo wo shiru hodo ni" - "The more I learn my place"
*   "...etc."

There was a slight hiccup, where the provided JSON reference initially mislabeled this initial segment as “Bakamajime.” But the lyrics were definitely for “Nobishiro.” The reference JSON has the lyrics for “Bakamajime,” but from 01:53 onward. The video actually has "Nobishiro" first, followed by "Bakamajime" from the Creepy Nuts collab with Ayase and Ikuta Lilas. I need to make the change.

Aha! So, from 00:00 to 01:53, it's "Nobishiro," and after that it transitions to "Bakamajime" from 01:53 onward. Knowing this allows me to work in two steps: transcribe “Nobishiro” manually, and then transcribe “Bakamajime” using the reference JSON.

For the segment from 01:53 onwards, the title “Bakamajime” appears on the screen, which *is* a prominent visual element that requires subtitling per the instructions.

So, I verified the lyrics of Bakamajime:
*   "Kudannai hanashi to uzattai kisama to naminamino hibi ni sosogareteku darui ga afuredashite iku" – “All this nonsense...and annoying you...are poured into these overflowing days.”
*   "Ime ga mada todokanai shigoto wa katazukenai" – "Laziness starts to overflow, and my food hasn't arrived yet. My work isn't done."
*   "...etc."

I continued the manual transcription, carefully aligning the lyrics to the audio, checking each line, comparing and checking the translation.

I had to ensure the lyrics and the timing are precisely aligned by double checking on the audio. So I also made sure "なみなみの日常に注がれてく" matches the audio with "なみなみの日々に注がれてく" for "Bakamajime."

I kept on verifying from 02:50.000.

I took the last verification step: review every single timecode and ensure nothing is missed or out-of-sync. I'm satisfied now.
